title: House Price Prediction
summary: Predict housing prices with regression techniques.
problem: Estimate house sale prices from features like area, rooms, and neighborhood.
dataset: Kaggle Housing Prices dataset with structured tabular features.
implementation: Clean data, encode categorical columns, train linear and tree-based regressors, and compare RMSE.
results: Gradient boosting reduced RMSE by 22% compared to baseline linear regression.

title: Spam Classifier
summary: Classify messages as spam or ham using NLP features.
dataset: SMS Spam Collection dataset with labeled text messages.
implementation: Apply TF-IDF vectorization and train Naive Bayes + Logistic Regression for comparison.
results: Best model achieved 98% accuracy with strong recall on spam class.

title: Customer Segmentation
summary: Group customers by behavior using unsupervised learning.
problem: Identify meaningful customer segments for targeted campaigns.
dataset: Mall Customers dataset containing annual income and spending score.
implementation: Scale features, use K-means clustering, and evaluate cluster quality using silhouette score.
results: Found 4 actionable clusters supporting targeted marketing strategy.

title: Image Classification
summary: Classify images using a convolutional neural network.
problem: Predict object category from image pixels.
dataset: CIFAR-10 image dataset with 10 object classes.
implementation: Train a lightweight CNN with data augmentation and early stopping.
results: Model reached 82% validation accuracy with strong generalization.
